subtitles.original: 全部全部あんたのせいだ 反吐が出るぐらいにウザったいわ
subtitles.english: It's all, all your fault. It's so annoying I want to throw up.

subtitles.original: 何かに縋って諂って 期待した私がバカだった
subtitles.english: Clinging to something, flattering... I was a fool to expect anything.

subtitles.original: ご機嫌伺いの八方美人 それ家でアンチ内職に一生懸命
subtitles.english: Pleasing everyone as a yes-man, while diligently working as an online troll at home.

subtitles.original: 浅いキャパシティ 毎度おきに 詰まるとこ人生ずっと地味
subtitles.english: Shallow capacity, thanks every time. In short, your life is always plain.

subtitles.original: 見苦しい 痛い 正しい 無視できないのがいっそ腹立たしい
subtitles.english: Unsightly, painful, "correct". It's rather annoying that I can't ignore it.

subtitles.original: 苛立たしい そろそろ飽きた自画自賛に
subtitles.english: Irritating. I'm getting tired of your self-praise.

subtitles.original: Likeの反対はApathy 歪なイコールで繋がれた証
subtitles.english: The opposite of "like" is apathy. Proof that we are connected by a distorted equal sign.

subtitles.original: 切り離せない関係 そらしてしまいたいわ
subtitles.english: A relationship that can't be severed. I want to turn my eyes away.

subtitles.original: これは言わゆるヘイトスピーチ
subtitles.english: This is what you call hate speech.

subtitles.original: 匿名性の生命を声明に乗せてんだ
subtitles.english: Putting anonymous life into a declaration.

subtitles.original: 鳴り止まないサイレン 掻き消すために痙攣
subtitles.english: The siren that won't stop ringing, convulsing to drown it out.

subtitles.original: 悪魔になりきってチュってする
subtitles.english: Playing the demon and blowing a kiss.

subtitles.original: 大嫌い あんたのこと私 大大嫌い
subtitles.english: I hate you. I really, really hate you.

subtitles.original: 重い 絡み避けたい もはや バイバイバイバイしたい
subtitles.english: Heavy, I want to avoid the entanglement, I already want to say bye-bye-bye-bye.

subtitles.original: 脳内 妄想の海に 溺れ 溺れ 溺れたい
subtitles.english: Inside my brain, I want to drown, drown, drown in the sea of delusion.

subtitles.original: どうだい？ 私のこと あんた 大大大嫌いになった？
subtitles.english: How about it? Did you come to really, really, really hate me?

subtitles.original: 嗚呼 100倍返し散らし死なし死なし もし隣り合わ並べても 2コティン無し
subtitles.english: Ah, returning it a hundredfold, scattering, dying... even if we are placed side-by-side, no nicotine.

subtitles.original: I miss youって近づいた結末は 凡ミス 凡ミス センキュー 犯名教室
subtitles.english: The ending of getting closer saying "I miss you" is a simple mistake, simple mistake. Thank you, classroom of the culprit's name.

subtitles.original: あとは自意識一生消えてくんないわ
subtitles.english: After that, my self-consciousness won't disappear for the rest of my life.

subtitles.original: よしよし良い子ね 愛嬌振り撒きパラパラ良い子ね
subtitles.english: There, there, good girl. Scattering charm around, a scatterbrained good girl.

subtitles.original: だけどだけどその本性は 善悪の区別もつかないの？
subtitles.english: But, but is her true nature unable to distinguish between good and evil?

subtitles.original: 減点方式 取り巻く環境に丸め込まれて
subtitles.english: Deduction system, getting sweet-talked by the surrounding environment...

subtitles.original: 生涯大体巻き込まれたって 当然の報いに変わっちゃった
subtitles.english: ...even if I get dragged into it for life, it turned into a natural retribution.

subtitles.original: 表は鏡なんです つまるところ依存は両辺で
subtitles.english: The surface is a mirror. In short, the dependence is on both sides.

subtitles.original: 遮断しても付き纏う 己の弱さが腑甲斐無い
subtitles.english: Even if blocked, it clings. My own weakness is pathetic.

subtitles.original: 全部全部あんたのせいって 反吐が出るくらいに止まんないわ
subtitles.english: Saying "it's all, all your fault" - it doesn't stop to the point of throwing up.

subtitles.original: いっそのこと切り離せたら 軽くなれるのにな
subtitles.english: If only we could sever ties, we could have become so much lighter.

subtitles.original: 大嫌い あんたのこと私 大大嫌い
subtitles.english: I hate you. I really, really hate you.

subtitles.original: 重い 絡み避けたい もはや バイバイバイバイしたい
subtitles.english: Heavy, I want to avoid the entanglement, I already want to say bye-bye-bye-bye.

subtitles.original: 脳内 妄想の海に 溺れ 溺れ 溺れたい
subtitles.english: Inside my brain, I want to drown, drown, drown in the sea of delusion.

subtitles.original: どうだい？ 私のこと あんた 大大大嫌いになった？
subtitles.english: How about it? Did you come to really, really, really hate me?

subtitles.original: 嗚呼 100倍返し散らし死なし死なし もし隣り合わ並べても 2コティン無し
subtitles.english: Ah, returning it a hundredfold, scattering, dying... even if we are placed side-by-side, no nicotine.

subtitles.original: I miss youって近づいた結末は 凡ミス 凡ミス センキュー 犯名教室
subtitles.english: The ending of getting closer saying "I miss you" is a simple mistake, simple mistake. Thank you, classroom of the culprit's name.

subtitles.original: あとは自意識一生消えてくんないわ
subtitles.english: After that, my self-consciousness won't disappear for the rest of my life.

subtitles.original: イェーイ！ イェーイ！
subtitles.english: Yay! Yay!

subtitles.original: どうも！
subtitles.english: Thank you!

subtitles.original: はい、というわけでゲストは、ゆいちゃんです！
subtitles.english: Yes! So, our guest is... Yui-chan!

subtitles.original: はーい！改めまして、Neo-Porte所属の緋月ゆいです！そらさん、お誕生日おめでとうございます！
subtitles.english: Yes! Once again, I'm Hizuki Yui, belonging to Neo-Porte! Sora-san, happy birthday!

subtitles.original: ありがとう！来てくれて嬉しい！ - おめでとう！
subtitles.english: Thank you! I'm so glad you came! - Congratulations!

subtitles.original: 1年ぶり！ - 1年ぶり！
subtitles.english: It's been a year! - It's been a year!

subtitles.original: ねー、去年はね、ちょっと残念ながらメッセージだけで... - あの、本当に...
subtitles.english: Yes, last year was unfortunately just a video message... - Um, really...

subtitles.original: 申し訳ございませんでした！ - いや、メッセージでもね、すごくみんな「おおー！」ってなってて
subtitles.english: I am terribly sorry! - No, even with the message, everyone was like, "Whoa!"

subtitles.original: 嬉しかったですよ！ - すごいガラガラ声で、去年は...
subtitles.english: I was so happy! - My voice was so raspy last year...

subtitles.original: 参加させていただいたんですけど、今年はリベンジができてとっても嬉しいです！
subtitles.english: ...when I participated, but I'm so happy I could have my revenge this year!

subtitles.original: やった！リベンジだ！ - 呼んでいただいて嬉しいです。ありがとうございます！
subtitles.english: Yay! Revenge! - I'm so happy you invited me. Thank you very much!

subtitles.original: こちらこそ！今回の曲もね、私が選んだんですけども
subtitles.english: Likewise! I chose this song for us this time...

subtitles.original: やっぱりあの、ゆいちゃんといえば、かっこいい声っていうのがすごく私の中で
subtitles.english: ...because when I think of Yui-chan, I think of your cool voice, and that was really in my head.

subtitles.original: あ、かっこいいよ！ - へえ、嬉しいです。かっこいいよ、って。
subtitles.english: Oh, you're cool! - Oh, I'm glad. "You're cool."

subtitles.original: なので、このデュエットっていうのもあるので、この曲をぜひ一緒に歌いたいと思って
subtitles.english: So since it's a duet, I really wanted to sing this song together...

subtitles.original: 嬉しい！ - リクエストしました！ - ありがとうございます！ - どうだったかな？
subtitles.english: I'm so happy! - ...so I requested it! - Thank you! - How was it?

subtitles.original: いや、あの、歌も超難しかったんですけど、
subtitles.english: Well, the singing was super difficult, too...

subtitles.original: どっちかっていうとダンスが、普段あんまりしないので - そうだよね
subtitles.english: ...but more than that, I don't usually dance much, so... - Right.

subtitles.original: ちょっとそらさんとダンスレッスンなどもね、やらせていただきましてですね
subtitles.english: I got to practice dance lessons with Sora-san...

subtitles.original: あ、したの！したの！ - 本番に向けて準備してまいりました！
subtitles.english: Ah, we did! We did! - ...and we prepared for the actual performance!

subtitles.original: ねー、でも振りはめちゃくちゃ速くてびっくりした！ - いやいや、恐縮でございます
subtitles.english: Yes, but the choreography was incredibly fast, I was shocked! - No, no, I am humbled. Nus.

subtitles.original: ちょっとね、「あー」って言いながらダンスして（笑） - そうそうそう（笑）
subtitles.english: We were like, "Ah!" while dancing. - Exactly (laughs).

subtitles.original: 間奏でターンするところがあったんですけど、みなさん。
subtitles.english: There was a part in the instrumental break where we turned, everyone.

subtitles.original: ターンが本当に体幹がなさすぎて、「あー！」って何回もよろけてですね、大変だったんですけど...
subtitles.english: I have so little core strength that during the turns, I kept stumbling and going "Ah!", so it was really tough...

subtitles.original: いや、でも本番は完璧だったんじゃないの？ - あ、良かったです！
subtitles.english: But didn't you do it perfectly during the actual performance? - Oh, thank goodness!

subtitles.original: いや、素晴らしい！ - 良かった、よろけなくて。めっちゃ頭の中で「よろけんじゃね、よろけんじゃね」と思いながら（笑）
subtitles.english: No, you were amazing! - I'm glad I didn't stumble. In my head, I kept thinking, "Don't stumble, don't stumble!" (laughs)

subtitles.original: そうだよね - 「よろけないように」っていうことを考えながら。
subtitles.english: Right. - While constantly thinking, "Keep steady."

subtitles.original: 意識しちゃうよね - 意識してました。そらさんが完璧なんで、ダンス。
subtitles.english: You end up focusing on it, right? - I was focusing on it. Sora-san is perfect at dancing, after all.

subtitles.original: いやいや、そんなことないから！ - だから、隣に立つから、私もよろけないようにしないとって思って
subtitles.english: No, no, not at all! - So since I stood next to you, I felt I had to make sure I wouldn't stumble either.

subtitles.original: 上手くいって良かったです！ - いや、本当に私も...
subtitles.english: I'm so glad it went well! - Yes, honestly, I also...

responses.thoughts:
**Subtitle Generation - My Thought Process**

Alright, let's get down to business. My task is to produce perfect subtitles for this concert video, and I need to do it precisely. First, I analyzed the requirements: the goal is audio-synchronized, contextually rich subtitles in JSON format using the `default_api:final_result` tool call. My input is this video segment and a helpful, but incomplete, JSON file.

Since the JSON reference is lacking in lyrics, I need to do some manual transcription of the performance, which stars Tokino Sora and Hizuki Yui. The song is "Dai Dai Dai Dai Daikirai." I was given a list of rules that I need to be aware of: millisecond sync, no overlapping, instant transitions for quick lyrics, both the original and English, no tags, and 50 chars limit.

Okay, let's get the ball rolling. I will break down this process into two primary components: the song portion, and the MC segment.

For the song itself, the zero ghost rule applies, so the intro won't be subtitled. The work will start at 0:13.000. I need to make sure the original lyrics (`og`) are in the correct format, and that the English translation (`en`) is natural-sounding. I was able to translate a large portion of the song, while taking note of who is singing each part. Now, that is done.

The dance break will also not be subtitled.

Then, there's the MC segment from 02:53.000, which requires careful transcription and an accurate translation. I was able to translate all of the dialogue and format it as such. Now, I will put all of the subtitles into the correct format.

I've refined all the timestamps to be precise, ensuring they adhere to the specified `MM:SS.mmm` format, no empty times. After, I need to review it. Okay, now, I'm ready to trigger the tool call with all the subtitles ready. Now, I am complete!
